objects.name: Clara's Field Notebook
objects.description: A graph-paper notebook filled with symbols, dates, and bark rubbings.
objects.narrative_use: Tracks clue progression and ties family observations together.
objects.gameplay_use: Unlocks new dialogue options after discovering related marks.
objects.art_notes: Worn green cover, pencil smudges, folded corner tabs.

objects.name: Lia's Chalk Bundle
objects.description: Short colored chalk sticks wrapped in cloth.
objects.narrative_use: Represents Lia's intuitive way of marking patterns.
objects.gameplay_use: Player can mark routes and compare with discovered sigils.
objects.art_notes: Soft pastel tones, powder residue on cloth knot.

objects.name: Broken Compass
objects.description: Needle drifts toward one valley regardless of orientation.
objects.narrative_use: Hints at magnetic interference near hidden machinery.
objects.gameplay_use: Points to anomaly zones and optional side clues.
objects.art_notes: Brass case, cracked glass, moss specks on rim.

objects.name: Fresh Tree Marker
objects.description: Three circles and a line carved into bark over old growth rings.
objects.narrative_use: Primary recurring symbol of the mystery thread.
objects.gameplay_use: Scannable clue that updates map overlays.
objects.art_notes: High contrast sap bleed, deliberate geometric cuts.

objects.name: Cabin Tin Radio
objects.description: Battery radio that picks up static pulses at night.
objects.narrative_use: Conveys unseen activity and mounting tension.
objects.gameplay_use: Tuning minigame reveals coded timing hints.
objects.art_notes: Retro 80s body, dented speaker grill, amber dial.

objects.name: Survey Stake
objects.description: Plastic-tipped stake hidden under leaf litter.
objects.gameplay_use: Collectible evidence item for confrontation scenes.
objects.art_notes: Fluorescent tip, mud caking, barcode sticker fragment.

objects.name: Inês's Map Tube
objects.description: Weatherproof tube holding old contour maps.
objects.narrative_use: Bridges folklore paths to formal survey routes.
objects.gameplay_use: Unlocks legacy map layer in interface.
objects.art_notes: Scuffed polymer shell, hand-painted initials IR.

objects.name: Silent Pollinator Jar
objects.description: Sampling jar with no bees in a usually active area.
objects.gameplay_use: Used in evidence board to trigger ecology exposition.
objects.art_notes: Glass jar, mesh lid, faded field label.

objects.name: Old Floodgate Key
objects.description: Heavy iron key from pre-dam maintenance era.
objects.narrative_use: Connects family history to land infrastructure.
objects.gameplay_use: Opens locked maintenance hatch in late chapter.
objects.art_notes: Oxidized metal, tag with hand-inked number 14.

objects.name: Maintenance Cassette
objects.description: Old tape with recorded notes from a former worker.
objects.narrative_use: Delivers backstory and confirms deliberate cover-up.
objects.art_notes: Clear shell cassette, handwritten date, magnetic wear.

objects.name: Buried Fiber Cable
objects.description: Industrial cable running beneath root systems.
objects.narrative_use: Hard evidence of hidden operation scale.
objects.gameplay_use: Interact to disable alarm route in climax.
objects.art_notes: Matte black sheath, clipped warning tags, damp soil.

objects.name: Sunfaded Family Photo
objects.description: An older photo from a summer before the loss.
objects.narrative_use: Anchors emotional stakes and shared memory.
objects.art_notes: Polaroid border, color fade, thumbtack hole at top.
